datasets.name: ds_recaudacion_mensual
queryLines:
SELECT
  fecha,
  anio,
  nombre_mes,
  isr_total,
  iva_total,
  ieps_total,
  otros_impuestos,
  total_tributario,
  meta_lif *1.2 as meta_lif,
  total_tributario / (meta_lif  *1.2) as cumplimiento_pct
FROM sat_demo.recaudacion_mensual
ORDER BY fecha

datasets.name: ds_recaudacion_anual
queryLines:
SELECT
  anio,
  SUM(isr_total)        AS isr_total,
  SUM(iva_total)        AS iva_total,
  SUM(ieps_total)       AS ieps_total,
  SUM(otros_impuestos)  AS otros_impuestos,
  SUM(total_tributario) AS total_tributario,
  SUM(meta_lif)         AS meta_lif,
  AVG(cumplimiento_pct) AS cumplimiento_pct
FROM sat_demo.recaudacion_mensual
GROUP BY anio
ORDER BY anio

datasets.name: ds_contribuyentes
queryLines:
SELECT
  anio,
  regimen,
  tipo_persona,
  sector_economico,
  total_registrados,
  total_activos,
  nuevos_registros,
  bajas
FROM sat_demo.contribuyentes_padron
WHERE trimestre = 4
ORDER BY anio, total_activos DESC

datasets.name: ds_total_contribuyentes
queryLines:
SELECT
  anio,
  SUM(total_registrados) AS total_registrados,
  SUM(total_activos)     AS total_activos
FROM sat_demo.contribuyentes_padron
WHERE anio = (SELECT MAX(anio) FROM sat_demo.contribuyentes_padron)
  AND trimestre = 4
GROUP BY anio

datasets.name: ds_declaraciones
queryLines:
SELECT
  fecha,
  anio,
  tipo_declaracion,
  subtipo,
  SUM(presentadas)           AS presentadas,
  SUM(con_pago)              AS con_pago,
  SUM(en_ceros)              AS en_ceros,
  SUM(a_favor_contribuyente) AS a_favor,
  SUM(extemporaneas)         AS extemporaneas
FROM sat_demo.declaraciones
GROUP BY fecha, anio, tipo_declaracion, subtipo
ORDER BY fecha

datasets.name: ds_retenciones
queryLines:
SELECT
  fecha,
  anio,
  sector_economico,
  concepto,
  SUM(monto_retenido)   AS monto_total,
  SUM(num_empleadores)  AS empleadores,
  SUM(num_trabajadores) AS trabajadores
FROM sat_demo.retenciones_detalle
GROUP BY fecha, anio, sector_economico, concepto
ORDER BY fecha, monto_total DESC

datasets.name: ds_devoluciones
queryLines:
SELECT
  fecha,
  anio,
  impuesto,
  tipo_operacion,
  sector_economico,
  SUM(monto)              AS monto_total,
  SUM(num_solicitudes)    AS solicitudes,
  AVG(dias_prom_atencion) AS dias_promedio
FROM sat_demo.devoluciones_compensaciones
GROUP BY fecha, anio, impuesto, tipo_operacion, sector_economico
ORDER BY fecha

datasets.name: ds_fiscalizacion
queryLines:
SELECT
  fecha,
  anio,
  tipo_acto,
  sector_contribuyente,
  SUM(actos_realizados)   AS actos,
  SUM(recaudacion_mdp)    AS recaudacion,
  AVG(rentabilidad)       AS rentabilidad,
  AVG(efectividad_pct)    AS efectividad
FROM sat_demo.fiscalizacion
GROUP BY fecha, anio, tipo_acto, sector_contribuyente
ORDER BY fecha

datasets.name: ds_crecimiento_anual
queryLines:
SELECT
  curr.anio,
  curr.total_tributario,
  prev.total_tributario                                         AS total_anterior,
  ROUND((curr.total_tributario - prev.total_tributario)
        / prev.total_tributario * 100, 2)                       AS crecimiento_pct
FROM (
  SELECT anio, SUM(total_tributario) AS total_tributario
  FROM sat_demo.recaudacion_mensual GROUP BY anio
) curr
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT anio, SUM(total_tributario) AS total_tributario
  FROM sat_demo.recaudacion_mensual GROUP BY anio
) prev ON curr.anio = prev.anio + 1
ORDER BY curr.anio

datasets.name: ds_dias_devolucion
queryLines:
SELECT
  anio,
  impuesto,
  ROUND(AVG(dias_prom_atencion), 1) AS dias_promedio
FROM sat_demo.devoluciones_compensaciones
WHERE tipo_operacion LIKE 'Devolución%'
GROUP BY anio, impuesto
ORDER BY anio, impuesto
